A Complete Unknown (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $75,001,720Details
International Box Office $65,506,932
Worldwide Box Office $140,508,652
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Set in the influential New York music scene of the early 60s, the film follows 19-year-old Minnesota musician Bob Dylan's meteoric rise as a folk singer to concert halls and the top of the charts — his songs and mystique becoming a worldwide sensation — culminating in his groundbreaking electric rock and roll performance at the Newport Folk Festival in 1965.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$11,655,553 (15.5% of total gross)
Legs:6.43 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:53.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$70,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,835 opening theaters/2,835 max. theaters, 6.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $76,639,762

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 25th, 2024 (Wide) by Searchlight Pictures
International Releases: January 17th, 2025 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
January 17th, 2025 (Wide), released as Kompletnie nieznany (Poland)
January 23rd, 2025 (Wide) (Australia)
January 23rd, 2025 (Wide) (Italy)
January 23rd, 2025 (Wide) (Croatia)
Video Release: February 25th, 2025 by Walt Disney Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for language.
(Rating bulletin 2856 (cert #55225), 10/16/2024)
Running Time: 140 minutes
Award nomination: 2025 Oscars Best Picture Nominee

Synopsis

Set in the influential New York music scene of the early 60s, the film follows 19-year-old Minnesota musician Bob Dylan's meteoric rise as a folk singer to concert halls and the top of the charts — his songs and mystique becoming a worldwide sensation — culminating in his groundbreaking electric rock and roll performance at the Newport Folk Festival in 1965.
